name: Salad - Fournou's Ovens
recipeInstructions:
Dressing:
Mix the egg yolk and mustard in a bowl. Add vinegar, then slowly pour in the oil while continuously whisking. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Salad:
Wash and dry the lettuce and endive. Toss the lettuce with dressing and arrange 3 leaves on each serving plate.
Toss the julienned endive with dressing and sprinkle over the lettuce.
Toss the shrimp with dressing and place on top of the lettuce.
Sprinkle the shredded Roquefort cheese, mushrooms, and chopped parsley over the salad before serving.
